titleStmt.title: SII 7.365: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 365. (A.R. No. 167 of 1901). ON A SLAB LYING NEAR A WELL CLOSE TO THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē(ṁ) namaḥ . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trailōkyana
garāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī . jayābhyudaya śakavaruṣa 1342 neya śā¨rvvari
saṁvatsarada kā¨rttika śu 1 Ā lu śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara Ārirāyavibhāḍa bhāṣegeta
ppuvarāyara gaṁḍa pū¨rvvapaścimadakṣiṇasamudrādhipati śrīvīrapratāpa dēvarāyamahā[rāyaru vi-]
jayanagararājyābhyudayadallu śrīmanmahāpradhāna śaṁkharadēvaOḍeyaru bārakūrarājyava nāḷu
va kāladallu maṇigāṟakēriya Oḷagaṇa sōmanāthadēvara sa(ṁ)nnidhiyalu Īśā(ṁ)nyadiki nali dāriya
li kaṭṭisida maṭhadali pratidivasadallu brāhmaṇabhōjana jana32kke dānadhārāpū¨rvvaka vāgi koṭṭa bāḷu pāṁḍēśa
rasana bāḷa catusīmeya vivara mūḍalu mahājanaṁgaḷa kaḷibuvanavara gaḍi kētayabheya vināyakadēvagaḍi
Iṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu hariyappaseṭṭiya gaḍi saṁkarahēraḷagaḍiIṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu kāraṁtara ga
ḍi mahādēvara gaḍi gōpaṁṇasēnabōvana gaḍiIṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu mahājanaṁgaḷa gaḍiIṁdaṁ teṁkalu I
ṁttī catusīmeyoḷaguḷa bayalu mekke makki saha bittuva bedegeṇagilu nāghaṁḍugadallu hāne 35 Adaṟa mū
ḍaṇa mūḍakaḷiya catusīme mūḍalu harida sāliṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu [Ē]kāṁgaseṭiya sōvaṁṇaseṭṭiya
gaḍiIṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu Ā sōvaṁṇaseṭṭiya gaḍiIṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu mahājanaṁgaḷa gaḍiIṁdaṁ teṁka
lu Iṁtī catussīmeyoḷaguḷa kaḷiyagadde bittuva bede nāghaṁḍugadalu mū 5 A bāḷa kūḍaṇa holeyāḷugaḷu
ḷūra mūlada bāḷa sarasu Ōjatiya makkaḷu viṣṇōjana bāḷa catussīme kakuḍana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu magavaṁṇaŌ
janagaḍiIṁdaṁ baḍagalu harida baccaliṁdaṁ mūḍalu kekuḍana gaḍiIṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catussīmeyoḷaguḷa bāḷa
lu bittuva bedegeṇagilu nāgaṁḍugadalu mūḍe 10 mattaṁ magaveṁṇaŌjana keṟeya bāgilagaddeyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu
ḷakōmayyana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu A gūḍiya gaḍiIṁdaṁ mūḍalu Ā gūḍiya keṟeya bāgila gaddeyiṁda teṁ
kalu dēvara mekkeya catussīme Aṁṇa Ōjana paḍuva ŌṇiIṁdaṁ paḍuvalu tōraṇakaliṁdaṁ kuḍana gaḍiIṁdaṁ
baḍagalu ŌṇiIṁdaṁ mūḍalu kāḍina gaḍiIṁdaṁ teṁkalu A Ibbara bage hokke maṇṇina mūṟu muḍe va
ḷabāgila gūḍiya bāḷa catussīme maneya bāgila koraImaṭhakke hōha dāriIṁdaṁ teṁkalu keṟe
lagadde maṭhakke teṁkaṇa Aṁciṁdaṁ teṁkalu magavaṁṇaŌjana gaḍiIṁdaṁ paḍuvalu viṣṇuŌjana gaḍiIṁdaṁ baḍa
galu ŌṇiIṁ mūḍalu baḍagaṇa haṭṭi mūḍaṇa maneyaḍi A¨rddhakaḷanu mūḍalu gaUriya gadde kriṣṇa Ōja
na gaḍiIṁdaṁ paḍuvalu kekuḍana gaḍiIṁda baḍagalu sarasuŌjattiya magaḷa gaḍiIṁdaṁ mūḍalu
gūḍiIṁdaṁ teṁkalu Antu bittuva bede nāgaṁḍagadalu muḍe 10 . AṁṇaŌjana gaḍi kāpiyaṁṇa seṭṭiya gaḍi
Iṁdaṁ paḍuvalu nāraṇamaIpāḍiya gaḍiIṁdaṁ baḍagalu Īśvara Ōjana gaḍiIṁdaṁ mūḍalu (ma)
magavaṁṇaŌjana gaḍiIṁdaṁ teṁkalu Ā bageya mane manebāgila gadeya gaḍi kriṣṇaŌjana makkaḷa gaḍi
Iṁdaṁ paḍuvalu kekuḍana gaḍiIṁdaṁ baḍagalu holada bēliIṁdaṁ mūḍalu magavaṇaŌjana gaḍiI
ṁdaṁ teṁkalu teṁkaṇa maneyaḍi mūḍaṇa bāgila koṭṭige baḍagaṇa haṭṭikaḷanu A¨rddhadiṁ
teṁkaṇa baḍagaṇa yeraḍu bhāviya nīru paḍuvaṇa gaddeya mēle Akki mūḍe 30 kkaṁ Akki mū
lagaddeya gaḍi hoḷeIṁdaṁ mūḍalu kōṭiyadahana gaḍiIṁdaṁ teṁkalu kāraṁtana gaḍi Iṁdaṁ
paḍuvalu nāraṇamēlaṁṭana gaḍiIṁdaṁ baḍagalu Iṁtī catussīmeyoḷage bittuva gadde nāgaṁḍu
gadallu mūḍe 7 makkiya maneya nāraṇamaIpāḍiya gaḍi kriṣṇana gaḍiIṁdaṁ mūḍalu kriṣṇaŌjana gaḍiIṁ
daṁ teṁkalu hariharana gaḍiIṁdaṁ paḍuvalu hosamāṭada gaddeIṁdaṁ baḍagalu bittuva bede nāgaṁḍuThe inscription is left unfinished.
Digital edition of SII 7.365 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
